name: SSO Authentication
description:
This plugin allows users to sign in through an SSO provider (such as Google, Facebook, or your own provider). This enables one-click signin.
Review documentation at https://github.com/Derksniff/jellyfin-plugin-sso
overview: Authenticate users against an SSO provider.

versions.changelog: Loading screen polish: branding logo, provider name in status, stuck/error buttons, fade-in, accessibility, and correct device version reported to Jellyfin.

Cache OIDC discovery per provider (endpoints + signing keys, 15-min TTL) to cut IdP round trips on every login. Includes the 4.0.0.4 fork changes (loading screen, crash/thread-safety/null-guard fixes).
Patched fork: animated login loading screen, fixed OIDC state cleanup crash, thread-safe auth state, working Unregister, null guards for empty scopes/roles, UTC state timing.
